case_title: COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY vs. VARGAS, EDUARDO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $107.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS, EDUARDO
